Welcome back, Maria Clara! How was the conference in Seoul? Was it good?
It was wonderful, Paulo. This conference was more formal than the previous one, and much more significant.
Interesting. And the university -- is it very different from ours?
Yes. The campus in Seoul is larger and more modern than ours. But our campus is more comfortable, in my opinion.
And the hotel? Was it better than last time?
The hotel was more comfortable, but it was also more expensive and more distant from the campus. Next time, I would rather stay in a local hotel.
That makes sense. What was the best moment of the week?
The final round table. It was the most important meeting, and I spoke in English, with no interpreter.
That is fantastic! Your English is really improving.
Thank you, Paulo. My current English is better than last year. The more I practice, the better I speak.
This conference was more formal than the previous one.
The university in Seoul is larger than ours.
This was the most important meeting of the week.
My current English is better than last year.

Hello, Maria Clara, this is Daniel from the council office. I have two hotel options for your next trip. The first hotel is more comfortable and more modern, but it is more expensive and more distant from the university. The second hotel is smaller and simpler, but it is cheaper and much closer to the campus. In my opinion, the second one is the better choice for a short trip. Please tell me which one you prefer. Thank you, and have a good day.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the annual conference. This year, our event is bigger than ever. We have more delegations than last year, and more speakers from distant countries. The program is also more formal, with three round tables instead of two. The most important session is on Friday morning, so please do not miss it. This is our most significant conference in ten years. Thank you all, and enjoy the week.

First, the university in Seoul was larger than ours. Then, the conference was more formal than the previous one. The best moment was the final round table. And my current English was better than last year.
